---
title: "test2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Ming Jun's S&P-500 code

```{r}
# =============================
# Libraries
# =============================
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(lubridate)
library(htmlwidgets)

# =============================
# Load Data
# =============================
df <- read.csv("../datasets/sp500.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
df$date <- as.Date(df$date)
df <- df %>% arrange(date)

# =============================
# Calculate Running Peak + Drawdown
# =============================
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    running_peak = cummax(GSPC.Close),
    drawdown = (GSPC.Close / running_peak - 1)
  )

# =============================
# Categorize Corrections
# =============================
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    correction_type = case_when(
      drawdown <= -0.10 ~ "Major (10%+)",
      drawdown <= -0.06 ~ "Medium (6-10%)",
      drawdown <= -0.03 ~ "Minor (3-6%)",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# =============================
# Identify Continuous Correction Periods
# =============================
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    correction_flag = !is.na(correction_type),
    correction_id = with(rle(correction_flag), rep(seq_along(lengths), lengths))
  )

# =============================
# Extract Troughs
# =============================
corrections_all <- df %>%
  filter(correction_flag) %>%
  group_by(correction_id, correction_type) %>%
  slice_min(drawdown, n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    trough_value = GSPC.Close,
    pct_drop = round(drawdown * 100, 2),
    trough_date = date
  )

# =============================
# Define Market Phases
# =============================
phase1_end <- as.Date("2020-02-29")
phase2_end <- as.Date("2021-12-31")

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    market_phase = case_when(
      date <= phase1_end ~ "Pre-COVID",
      date > phase1_end & date <= phase2_end ~ "Crash & Recovery",
      TRUE ~ "Post-COVID"
    )
  )

corrections_all <- corrections_all %>%
  mutate(
    market_phase = case_when(
      trough_date <= phase1_end ~ "Pre-COVID",
      trough_date > phase1_end & trough_date <= phase2_end ~ "Crash & Recovery",
      TRUE ~ "Post-COVID"
    ),
    type_phase = paste0(correction_type, "_", market_phase)
  )

# =============================
# Color Palettes
# =============================

# Pre + Crash colors stay warm
# Post-COVID now uses cool teal/blue/purple palette

colors_phase <- c(
  # Pre-COVID
  "Minor (3-6%)_Pre-COVID" = "#FFD580",
  "Medium (6-10%)_Pre-COVID" = "#FFB347",
  "Major (10%+)_Pre-COVID" = "#FF6B6B",
  
  # Crash & Recovery
  "Minor (3-6%)_Crash & Recovery" = "#FFA500",
  "Medium (6-10%)_Crash & Recovery" = "#FF851B",
  "Major (10%+)_Crash & Recovery" = "#FF4136",
  
  # Post-COVID (NEW COOL PALETTE)
  "Minor (3-6%)_Post-COVID" = "#66C2A5",
  "Medium (6-10%)_Post-COVID" = "#3288BD",
  "Major (10%+)_Post-COVID" = "#5E4FA2"
)

# =============================
# Create Plot
# =============================
p <- plot_ly()

# ---- Line by Phase ----
for(phase in unique(df$market_phase)) {
  
  phase_data <- df %>% filter(market_phase == phase)
  
  line_color <- case_when(
    phase == "Pre-COVID" ~ "#1f77b4",
    phase == "Crash & Recovery" ~ "#2ca02c",
    TRUE ~ "#6A5ACD"   # Post-COVID new tone
  )
  
  p <- p %>%
    add_lines(
      data = phase_data,
      x = ~date,
      y = ~GSPC.Close,
      line = list(color = line_color, width = 2.5),
      name = paste("S&P 500 -", phase),
      hovertemplate = "<b>Date:</b> %{x}<br><b>Close:</b> %{y:.2f}<extra></extra>"
    )
}

# ---- Add Correction Markers ----
for(tp in unique(na.omit(corrections_all$type_phase))) {
  
  p <- p %>%
    add_markers(
      data = corrections_all %>% filter(type_phase == tp),
      x = ~trough_date,
      y = ~trough_value,
      marker = list(
        size = 12,
        color = colors_phase[tp],
        line = list(color = "black", width = 2)
      ),
      customdata = ~paste("Drop:", pct_drop, "%"),
      name = tp,
      hovertemplate = paste(
        "⚠ <b>", tp, "</b><br>",
        "%{customdata}<extra></extra>"
      )
    )
}

# =============================
# Layout with Phase & Event Lines
# =============================
p <- p %>%
  layout(
    title = "S&P 500 — Corrections (3%+ Drawdowns)",
    xaxis = list(title = "Date"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Index Level"),
    hovermode = "closest",
    
    shapes = list(
      # Phase boundaries
      list(
        type = "line",
        x0 = as.Date("2020-03-01"),
        x1 = as.Date("2020-03-01"),
        y0 = 0, y1 = 1,
        xref = "x", yref = "paper",
        line = list(color = "black", width = 2, dash = "dot")
      ),
      list(
        type = "line",
        x0 = as.Date("2022-01-01"),
        x1 = as.Date("2022-01-01"),
        y0 = 0, y1 = 1,
        xref = "x", yref = "paper",
        line = list(color = "black", width = 2, dash = "dot")
      ),
      # April 2025 Tariff Announcement
      list(
        type = "line",
        x0 = as.Date("2025-04-01"),
        x1 = as.Date("2025-04-01"),
        y0 = 0, y1 = 1,
        xref = "x", yref = "paper",
        line = list(color = "red", width = 2, dash = "dash")
      ),
      list(
        type = "line",
        x0 = as.Date("2023-05-05"),
        x1 = as.Date("2023-05-05"),
        y0 = 0,
        y1 = 1,
        xref = "x",
        yref = "paper",
        line = list(color = "#2ca02c", width = 2, dash = "dash")
      )
    ),
    
    annotations = list(
      
      # ---- April 2025 Tariff Announcement ----
      list(
        x = as.Date("2025-04-01"),
        y = max(df$GSPC.Close) * 0.95,
        xref = "x",
        yref = "y",
        text = "April 2025<br>Tariff Announcement",
        showarrow = TRUE,
        arrowhead = 2,
        ax = 40,
        ay = -40,
        font = list(color = "red", size = 12)
      ),
      
      # ---- 5 May 2023 Endemic Declaration ----
      list(
        x = as.Date("2023-05-05"),
        y = max(df$GSPC.Close) * 0.85,
        xref = "x",
        yref = "y",
        text = "5 May 2023<br>COVID Endemic",
        showarrow = TRUE,
        arrowhead = 3,
        ax = -40,
        ay = -40,
        font = list(color = "#2ca02c", size = 12)
      )
    )
  )

saveWidget(
  p,
  file = "../images/sp500_dashboard.html",
  selfcontained = TRUE
)

p
```

```         

```{=html}
<script>
document.querySelectorAll('.plotly-graph-div').forEach(function(graph) {
  graph.on('plotly_click', function(data){
    var url = data.points[0].customdata;
    if(url) window.open(url, '_blank');  // open linked QMD chart
  });
});
</script>
```
